title: CreateLiteSurvival
description: A survival modpack based around create!
body:
Dive into a world where the boundaries of engineering are yours to explore, thanks to the inclusion of the Create mods! Build intricate contraptions, automate tasks, and marvel at the possibilities as you harness the power of mechanical innovation to transform your world.

But it's not just about technology; survival is at the heart of this modpack. With carefully selected mods, your journey will be filled with new challenges and opportunities. From immersive weapons to dangerous creatures, every step you take is a test of your skills and resilience. We also try to maximise experience with performance boosters such as sodium, iris shaders and many more!
